textByHash.007d888309a87abc7f807f7e1216c52ddfa85d6d: Are you sure? I mean, are you REALLY sure? Maybe you'd better look again...
textByHash.02697983daebe0fc73c23b879326d749c579b35f: came down here I was attacked by...
textByHash.0297224bcd635ab7e48d51d9d59c421c7d5f2be6: Well, bring it here and let's take a look at it!
textByHash.02e974df867424f96ea5ff2b5cb731b0b091f2c5: It is very faint, however... Can you read it?
textByHash.0593d58f4e7fd75bae8ccf10a91a7f82439430e3: Wow! It's a Holy Book of Saradomin! I thought these things had all vanished! Well, it's all yours, I hope you appreciate it.
textByHash.0d9d902fa9b415ba02fc507caf1a867a5e072ffb: I can indeed! Here, let me have a closer look... Yes! There is something written on it!
textByHash.10cd7fa7257b648ab176a5d087e35c7eed532043: That was not the creature that attacked me...
textByHash.163c24b3c94b8660a531c4518241257647ce0b01: For now, this casket definitely says Saradomin, Zamorak or Guthix. Which do you think it is?
textByHash.23c362e861f9320a98bea381e1fd7c9f2629d20e: Why, of course you did! You dropped it and I picked it up! I have it right here!
textByHash.26f54bd0f4bddb5cebdc8b4adf50c2d5daa9d6ff: That was one of its babies...
textByHash.283d5994d3b4852c07a6c7bfed6ce263fcdad4c4: Follow me upstairs, I might be able to help you with that casket you found.
textByHash.2870d13e6d5e1b2cb77570c77910ae9883cbdaa0: It seems I was not as injured as I thought I was after all! I must thank you again for all of your help! Now, about that casket you found on that monster's corpse...
textByHash.2cf7668bc708423e26bd915a858559dfc33e79a9: The sea's always washing up interesting stuff around my lighthouse. Perhaps I'll find something more suitable for you in future.
textByHash.2e2da694bccc53560b783a0cc9146e5c6c46298c: Yes, quickly, the mother might be dead, but it's children are not!
textByHash.6ebee453b920eef38e83677df02086606222cf42: Ah yes, I wanted to talk to you about the casket you found on that monster's corpse...
textByHash.79e41a0a27a27e578066e8d7181f9be0a92c32ed: I... I do not know. I have never seen their like before!
textByHash.7c6792a60c6291e688d7bd6243b6cf273a3381b3: Now let's have a look at it... There is some writing on it, but it is very faint... Can you make it out?
textByHash.852fc06bd091e8aa0d57ad15771fa2183f396fdd: [cough] Please... please help me... I think my leg is broken, and those creatures will be back any minute now!
textByHash.89ed8ef3998f76fac52a2b234b32e9d69665ebcd: I think you're right! Hand it here, and let's see what's inside!
textByHash.8d622b10abd18e2d64f2f0180c15d22757cf2f84: I was searching for information about my uncle Silas, who vanished mysteriously from this lighthouse many months ago. I found the secret of that strange wall, and discovered that I could use it as a door, but when I
textByHash.8e95a62b918c920b7e9216a497d7a850231407b0: Well, I do not know what they are, but they are very strong! They hurt me badly enough to trap me here, and I have been fearing for my life ever since!
textByHash.b0968a7046874da24a3602e541368c4f7b1f6331: Hello again, adventurer. What brings you this way?
textByHash.bee345de3af97af87c27364b602bf0aaea374bed: Wow! It's an Unholy Book of Zamorak! I thought these things had all vanished! Well, it's all yours, I hope you appreciate it.
textByHash.bfb01d53f9618bc6035390f95b1378662d4dbeb4: Why, of course you did! You dropped it and I picked it up! Now, free up some inventory space so we can see what's inside it.
textByHash.c335a1c1f1670df594b8db3b2280816831fb9a8f: Sure thing! I think you'll find my prices are remarkable!
textByHash.dc0f6a569827a14b78761acc840b9c7b8d7f93a9: Bring it to my library, it looks familiar somehow...
textByHash.e7880a4645aed2c9c44a5a5514104dbca271de99: Wow! It's Guthix's Book of Balance! I thought these things had all vanished! Well, it's all yours, I hope you appreciate it.
textByHash.e85de27cc019bae12fcff01e599a478f11fa7ce6: NO! No, you can't leave me now! Look! They're coming again! Do something!
textByHash.fdb982d52936b68c53677f2d4e273a7d56700a9a: It's amazing how things like that keep washing up on the shore in caskets. Take a look at what I've got...
